_doc: Placeholder settlement templates for the editor's Settlement tool (key 0). Placing one stamps a cluster of NORMAL structures (houses, walls, fountain, market…) that you then hand-edit per placement with the Structure/Erase tools. Tune a size here (radius, building counts, wall) and re-place to restyle. Sizes scale camp < hamlet < village < town < city. Fields: radius (tile half-extent), houses/halls/tents/stalls/lamps (counts), well/fountain/campfire (centre feature), anvil/chest (services), wall ('partial' | 'full'), sign (entrance signpost).
